title: carduus affinis subsp. brutius
intro: Carduus affinis subsp. brutius, also known as Sardinian thistle, is a subspecies of thistle plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Carduus affinis subsp. brutius include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health problems.
